If your organization has policies against logging prompt content to your SIEM, configure filtering or redaction in your collector before routing events downstream. Tool parameters may include sensitive values. File paths, command arguments, and other tool inputs are exported in the tool_parameters field. Plan your retention and access policies accordingly. User email addresses are included in event attributes. If this is a concern, filter or redact at the collector. User email addresses are included in event attributes. If this is a concern, filter or redact at the collector. Events are only exported when an admin configures an OTLP endpoint. No data flows by default. Events are only exported when an admin configures an OTLP endpoint. No data flows by default. Joining OpenTelemetry data with the Compliance API Each Cowork OTel event includes a shared user account identifier you can use to correlate events with records from the Compliance API . This lets you build a unified view that combines real-time telemetry from OTel with longer-term records from Compliance API queries.
